---
name: Specification review
about: Report an ambiguity, contradiction, or gap in a PoG framework document
title: "[REVIEW] "
labels: review
---

**Document and section**
Which document (POG-SPEC, POG-TM, POG-CTP, POG-CP) and which section?

**Type of issue**
Ambiguity / Contradiction / Unimplementable requirement / Missing requirement / Missing test coverage / Other

**Description**
What is wrong, and why does it matter? The bar for ambiguity: could two independent teams implement this section and end up with incompatible behavior?

**Suggested resolution (optional)**

**Credit**
Do you want to be credited in the changelog? Yes / No
